_4ik4 2: “What does ADHD even mean? Am I a terrible mom?” I couldn’t get the answers to figure out the right way to move forward for myself or my ADHD kid.I spent several months working with a therapist and feeling no more “fixed” than when I started. I worked with a coach, but he didn’t know anything about ADHD - how do I explain when I can’t make myself do something even if I know I need to do it? We didn’t get anything done because he didn’t understand the questions to ask and I didn’t know how much of a gap there was between his experiences and mine.Working with a coach who understands (and has) ADHD means that you have a safe space to speak your truth, who listens with compassion to your concerns and frustrations, and can create a plan with you to support your Aspirations and desired Outcomes, understanding much (but not all) of your specific experience and inviting you to bring your whole self and family into the plan.Join our private group to feel supported and learn more about ADHD and parenting kids with ADHD while being caught in our own “neuro-spiciness”.See you inside! Stephanie
